lines.english: I have enshrined the Naam, the One Name, within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੀ ਤੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naam japee tai naam dhiaaee mehal paae gun gaahaa he |11|
lines.english: I chant the Naam, and meditate on the Naam. Singing His Glorious Praises, I enter the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||11||
The Perfect True Guru has imparted this understanding.
The self-willed manmukhs do not know the value of the Lord's Command.
The servant serves, and obeys the Command of the Infinite Lord.
By Guru's Grace, one recognizes the Lord's Hukam.
The wandering mind is restrained, and brought back to the home of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਮੰਨੇ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: hukame mane hukame vaddiaaee hukame veparavaahaa he |12|
lines.english: By the Hukam of the Lord's Command, one is exalted; by His Hukam, one is glorified; by His Hukam, one becomes carefree. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag meh varatai eko soee |
lines.english: The One Lord is pervasive throughout all the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਰਾਤਾ ਸਦਾ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਮਨਿ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naame raataa sadaa bairaagee naam ratan man taahaa he |13|
lines.english: Imbued with the Naam, one remains forever detached; the jewel of the Naam rests within the mind. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਸਲਾਹਹਿ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: sabad salaaheh se jan niramal nij ghar vaasaa taahaa he |14|
lines.english: Those humble beings who praise the Shabad are immaculate; they dwell within the home of their own inner self. ||14||
The devotees abide forever in Your Sanctuary, Lord.
By Guru's Grace, He is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਤੂ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: jiau tudh bhaaveh tiau too raakheh guramukh naam dhiaahaa he |15|
lines.english: As it pleases Your Will, You keep us; the Gurmukh meditates on the Naam. ||15||
You are inaccessible and unfathomable; Your value cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਸਚੁ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੧॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak saach kahai benantee sach devahu sach samaahaa he |16|1|10|
lines.english: Nanak offers this true prayer: O Lord, please bless me with Truth, that I may merge in the Truth. ||16||1||10||
O my True Lord and Master, may I become pleasing to Your Mind.
Forever and ever, I sing Your Glorious Praises.
Maaroo, Third Mehl:
Those who serve the True Guru are very fortunate.
Night and day, they remain lovingly attuned to the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਰਵਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚੈ ਓਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa sukhadaataa raviaa ghatt antar sabad sachai omaahaa he |1|
lines.english: The Lord, the Giver of peace, abides forever deep within their hearts; they delight in the True Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਸਬਦੇ ਮਨਿ ਓਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har man vasiaa sadaa sukhadaataa sabade man omaahaa he |2|
lines.english: The Lord, the Giver of peace, abides forever within the mind; the mind is delighted with the Word of the Shabad. ||2||
When the Lord grants His Grace, one meets with the Guru.
The Name of the Lord is enshrined within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਰਹੈ ਇਕ ਰੰਗੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਸੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਕਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa mukat rahai ik rangee naahee kisai naal kaahaa he |3|
lines.english: In the Love of the One Lord, one remains liberated forever; he is not in conflict with anyone. ||3||
When the Lord bestows His Mercy, He unites in His Union.
Egotism and attachment are burned away by the Shabad.
Without serving the True Guru, there is only pitch-black darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਮਹਾ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਸਬਦੇ ਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jo sabad raate mahaa bairaagee so sach sabade laahaa he |4|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Shabad, are very detached. They earn the profit of the True Word of the Shabad. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai koe na paavai paaraa |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, no one crosses over to the other side.
He Himself has caused the love of duality to be pervasive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਕਰਤੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh karatai dhur likh paaeaa |
lines.english: Pain and pleasure are pre-ordained by the Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਜੋ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: se manamukh jo sabad na pachhaaneh |
lines.english: Those who do not recognize the Shabad are manmukhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਅਲਿਪਤੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਵੇਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su alipato varatai manamukh kaa kiaa vesaahaa he |5|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh remains detached; how can anyone trust the self-willed manmukh? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਭੈ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke bhai kee saar na jaaneh |
lines.english: They do not know the essence of the Fear of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਉ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਮੁ ਕਾਢਿ ਲਏਗਾ ਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bhai bin kiau nirbhau sach paaeeai jam kaadt legaa saahaa he |6|
lines.english: Without this Fear, how can anyone find the Fearless True Lord? The Messenger of Death will pull the breath out. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabade nerr na aaee |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad prevents him from approaching.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣੇ ਤਾ ਦੂਰਹੁ ਭਾਗੈ ਮਤੁ ਮਾਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sabad sune taa doorahu bhaagai mat maare har jeeo veparavaahaa he |7|
lines.english: When he hears the Word of the Shabad, he runs far away. He is afraid that the self-sufficient Dear Lord will kill him. ||7||
The invulnerable Messenger of Death cannot be killed.
What can this wretched Messenger of Death do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ਹੈ ਸਭ ਸਿਰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo kee hai sabh sirakaaraa |
lines.english: The Dear Lord is the Ruler above all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਬੰਦਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਕਢਦਾ ਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: hukamee bandaa hukam kamaavai hukame kadtadaa saahaa he |8|
lines.english: As slave to the Hukam of the Lord's Command, the mortal acts according to His Hukam. According to His Hukam, he is deprived of his breath. ||8||
The Gurmukh realizes that the True Lord created the creation.
The Gurmukh knows that the Lord is the Architect of karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਬੂਝੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai so sach boojhai sabad sachai sukh taahaa he |9|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh, understands the True Lord. Through the True Word of the Shabad, he finds peace. ||9||
The Gurmukh knows that the Lord has expanded the entire expanse.
